nasb.text: But the people took some of the spoil, sheep and oxen, the choicest of the things devoted to destruction, to sacrifice to the Lord your God at Gilgal.”

esv.text: But the people took of the spoil, sheep and oxen, the best of the things devoted to destruction, to sacrifice to the Lord your God in Gilgal.”

cnv.text: 可是眾民卻從那些戰利品中，取了應當毀滅之物中上好的牛羊，要在吉甲獻給耶和華你的　神為祭。”

ccb.text: 士兵们却从本该毁灭的战利品中取了上好的牛羊，准备在吉甲奉献给你的上帝耶和华。”
